title: UPDATE row with row value constructor crashes monetdb server
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value DECIMAL(10, 2), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test', 100.00);
UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Updated', value = NULL WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, description) VALUES (1, 'Reference to test_table');
key_bug_features: UPDATE with row value constructor crashes server
